_comment: Allowlist for scripts/validate-framework.js markdown link checking. consumerFiles: paths that exist only in CONSUMER repos — the framework's managed docs legitimately cite them ('if present' cites). Supports exact repo-relative paths and 'dir/**' prefixes. knownIssues: temporarily suppressed genuinely-broken links, each { file, target, note } — fix the doc and remove the entry; stale entries fail validation.
